items.name: Electricity Maps
items.description: An API that provides real-time and forecast carbon intensity data for electricity grids around the world.

items.name: WattTime
items.description: An API that provides real-time and forecast marginal carbon intensity data for electricity grids around the world.

items.name: Energy-Charts
items.description: A service that provides data on electricity generation, consumption, and carbon intensity for various countries in Europe.

items.name: Carbon-Intensity UK
items.description: An API service from UK National Grid ESO that provides carbon intensity data for the UK electricity grid.

items.name: Carbon-Aware-Computing.com
items.description:
An API service and tool suite for carbon-aware computing with focus on Europe.
The API service provides real-time and forecast carbon intensity data for European countries, using data from Energy-Charts and UK National Grid ESO.
The data is also provided as JSON formatted files that are consumable by the Carbon Aware SDK.
